headline: Mercedes’ electric AMG GT 4-door coupe can go 0-60 in 2 seconds
summary: Mercedes unveiled its new ultra-high performance AMG GT 4-door EV. The electric coupe boasts a blistering 0-60 mph acceleration in just 2 seconds. It incorporates advanced technology from Mercedes' record-setting XX concept.

headline: Wear OS 7 will keep track of deliveries and sports scores on your wrist
summary: Google announced Wear OS 7, bringing new features to smartwatches. The update will introduce iPhone-style Live Updates for your wrist. Track deliveries and real-time sports scores directly from your smartwatch.

headline: Plex is tripling the price of a lifetime pass to $750 after doubling it last year
summary: Plex is tripling its lifetime pass price to $750, effective July 1st. This follows a previous price doubling last year. Users have a limited window to secure the current, lower rate.

headline: Demis Hassabis said this might be the ‘foothills of the singularity.’ What?
summary: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis called current AI a "profound moment for humanity." He suggested we are in the "foothills of the singularity" with AGI development. Google's AI aims to unlock AGI's potential for global benefit.

headline: Hasbro Cancels Dungeons & Dragons Game from Star Wars Jedi: Survivor Director
summary: Hasbro has canceled a new Dungeons & Dragons game. The game was being developed by Stig Asmussen, director of Star Wars Jedi: Survivor. This marks a significant project cancellation for the franchise.

headline: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Shows Off No-HUD Option
summary: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced remake was showcased. The new version will feature an optional, fully disableable HUD. Players can enjoy a more immersive, UI-free experience.

headline: Save 30% off the Bluetti AC70 768Wh 1,000W LiFePO4 Power Station During the AliExpress Memorial Day Sale
summary: The Bluetti AC70 power station is on sale for Memorial Day. Get 30% off the 768Wh, 1,000W LiFePO4 unit. The deal is available via AliExpress, offering a lower price than Amazon.

headline: Get a 48V 500W Adult Electric Scooter with 22-Mile Range and a Top Speed of 22 MPH for $165
summary: A powerful 48V 500W adult electric scooter is available for $165. It boasts a 22-mile range and a top speed of 22 MPH. This exceptional deal offers significant value for its price point.

headline: UK loosens Russian oil sanctions as fuel prices rise
summary: The UK has eased some sanctions on Russian oil. This move comes amid rising global fuel prices. Concerns over fuel supply, linked to the Strait of Hormuz, influenced the decision.

headline: Twenty-two years in the making - how Arsenal celebrated title win
summary: Arsenal celebrated a historic title win after a 22-year wait. Players and fans savored every moment of the victory celebration. The long-awaited success led to jubilant scenes on Tuesday night.

headline: Was Married at First Sight UK an 'accident waiting to happen'?
summary: Channel 4 faces scrutiny over allegations from three Married at First Sight UK participants. The show is being questioned if it was an "accident waiting to happen." Wider concerns about participant welfare have been raised.

headline: Young drivers targeted by 'ghost brokers' selling fake car insurance online
summary: Young drivers are being targeted by "ghost brokers" online. Bogus brokers sell fake car insurance policies through social media. The finance watchdog warns consumers against these fraudulent schemes.
